zh.Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry I fitzRobert de Trafford於大約1180年出生在英國藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾時，他的父親Robert fitzRandulph de Trafford30歲，母親Margaret de Massey23歲。他於1207年與Christine of Lancashire在英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特特拉福德 帕克結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1221年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry I fitzRobert de Trafford于大约1180年出生在英国藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾时，他的父亲Robert fitzRandulph de Trafford30岁，母亲Margaret de Massey23岁。他于1207年与Christine of Lancashire在英国英格兰格亞特 曼徹斯特特拉福德 帕克结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1221年之前。

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry I fitzRobert de Trafford was born about 1180, in Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England, his father, Robert fitzRandulph de Trafford, was 30 and his mother, Margaret de Massey, was 23. He married Christine of Lancashire in 1207, in Trafford Park, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died before 1221.

Il a épousé Christine of Lancashire en 1207, à Trafford Park, Greater Manchester, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé avant 1221.

ko.Trafford Park, Greater Manchester, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 트래퍼드 박
ko.lifeSummary: Henry I fitzRobert de Trafford(이)가 대략 1180년 영국 랭카실르 트래퍼드 먼어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert fitzRandulph de Trafford(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Massey(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1207년 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 트래퍼드 박에서 Christine of Lancashire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1221년 이전 사망했다.
